title: EnGuard manifest
description: env.json — the single source of truth for a Laravel app's environment variables and boot-time guards.

$schema.description: Path or URL to this schema, enabling editor validation and autocomplete.

environments.description: The closed set of legal environments. An APP_ENV outside this list is itself a violation (ADR-0003).

variables.description: Declared environment variables. EnGuard judges ONLY these; undeclared vars are ignored (ADR-0007).

propertyNames.description: A valid environment variable name (uppercase by convention).

description.description: Human-readable purpose. env:generate writes this as a # comment above the key.

secret.description: If true: validated by SHAPE only (equals/oneOf/notOneOf/value become illegal — enforced by EnGuard, not this schema); env:generate writes it blank.

rules.description: Rulesets keyed by 'default' and environment names. A named env shallow-merges OVER default, key by key; omission inherits, explicit value wins (ADR-0005). Keys must be 'default' or a declared environment — cross-checked by EnGuard, not this schema.

ruleSet.description: Constraints for one environment. All keys optional; omitted keys inherit from 'default'.

required.description: Must the variable be present in this environment? Set explicitly to false to override a required 'default' off.

forbidden.description: Must the variable be ABSENT in this environment? Mutually exclusive with required:true (EnGuard rejects the combination).

type.description: Value must parse as this type.

matches.description: Value MUST match this pattern (PCRE at runtime). e.g. '^sk_live_' for a Stripe live key.

rejects.description: Value must NOT match this pattern. e.g. '^sk_live_' locally to block a live key.

equals.description: Enforce an exact value. ILLEGAL for secrets. Also used as the env:generate seed.

oneOf.description: Value must be one of these. ILLEGAL for secrets.

notOneOf.description: Value must not be any of these. ILLEGAL for secrets.

value.description: Generation default: seeds env:generate but is NOT enforced. Use 'equals' to enforce. ILLEGAL for secrets.
